title: I Am What I Am
writer: Tinto Brass, Sergio Donati, Francesco Longo
actors: Jean-Louis Trintignant, Ewa Aulin, Roberto Bisacco
plot: Bernard meets Jane in a night club, in London, and he likes her. Her father was killed in a car accident, but she thinks he has been killed because he was blackmailed for a picture of his second wife, Jane's mother in-law. In the ...
